programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Kitty Continued: The Narrator's kitten is back and Pins and Nettie still have a hard time dealing with her.
It's Time for a Folk Tale: JoJo & Gran Gran are with Cynthia and the Nature Club to hear a special folk tale from a special person.
It's Time to Braid Hair: At Charlene's hair salon, JoJo sees a picture of a girl with hair braids - can Gran Gran braid her hair? It's time for a Gran Gran plan with some help from Charlene.
Banana: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Banana revealing an astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, I've Got a Secret.
Pumpkin: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Pumpkin demonstrating incredible strength and attempting to break a Roots and Fruits record.
Wild Guy lets his imagination run WILD when he convinces himself (and others) that there are some ginormous visitors in Bright's Park.
Phoenix eagerly joins in some Puffin Practice with Oona, Isabelle and Baba but doubts himself when he can't do everything they can.
On a stormy day, Oona and Baba find Mossy and the Shrew Crew hiding from the thunder and lightning.
Doodle Girl comes across a crumpled sketchbook page. She's never doodled with something this messy before! Where to start?
The Chatty Library: The Mixmups mix up a Chatty Library adventure so that they can listen to some real talking books.
Zigzag's No Poo Problem: When Zigzag hasn't had a poo in two days, Vida sets up a scavenger hunt full of clues to help her go.
Pippen's Stomach Bug: When her brother has a stomach bug, Pippen is afraid to catch it because she doesn't like bugs!
Transportation: Ms Kashani leads a road rally where the Dream Factory Crew get to demonstrate their navigation skills.
Disappearing Pigeons: The Dream Factory Crew builds a pigeon coop to house a bunch of wandering pigeons that have 'invaded' the Dream Factory.
Competition between Norman and Derek to make the best stone age shelter goes too far and causes a fire on Pontypandy Island.
It's the opening of the New Fire Station and Norman hasn't got his Pioneer uniform ready. Dilys rushes to iron it, but the old iron she uses causes a fire.
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Sports Centre to make some deliveries and to play some games. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy go to the Farm to make some special deliveries to the farm animals. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Winter Games: Sodor is in a flurry of snow and excitement as the island welcomes ski jumpers and snowboarders to participate in the Winter Games.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Accidental Bad Guy: Thomas is given a super task for the day - delivering boxcars full of the latest edition of Ultratrain and the Carriages of Justice.
Andy And The Chimps: When Andy loses some kapok tree seeds that Mr Hammond was hoping to plant in the chimp enclosure, it's up to Andy to jet off to Africa and track down some more.
To avoid Mrs. Nolan boasting about a trophy she won for best cake, Cranky pretends to be ill. Along comes Doctor Punky, with her doctor's bag. She knows what's best for Cranky?
Tá Hugo agus Sonia ag iarraidh mealbhacán uisce foirfe a phiocadh don chlann.
Níl Sonia ná Hugo in ann na réaltaí a fheiceáil sa spéir ach feiceann siad rud éigin aoibhinn eile.
Lily finds a cookie cutter on the beach, and thinks it would be a good idea to open a food stall at the Driftwood Bay harbour.
A huge statue hurtles out of control after a disaster near Stag Castle.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá.... is tá Mya ag súgradh lena cairde sa ghairdín tosaigh. Ó, seo chugainn Peigí Pór.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.
The duo want to make an igloo but there just isn't enough snow.
It's too hot for Nelly and Nora, who yearn for rain.
On a day when everything is going wrong, Kiva, Saul and Angus find a clever way to cheer Nanni up.
The Wee Little must reunite three ants with their family after they follow Jeremy home by accident.
Hedgie Kitty Continued: The Narrator's kitten is back and Pins and Nettie still have a hard time dealing with her.
Henry visits the Pet Groomers with his pet dog. There he meets a Brush. It's the day of the Big Pet Show but the Pet Groomer had to go home as they were allergic to cats!
Transportation: Ms Kashani leads a road rally where the Dream Factory Crew get to demonstrate their navigation skills.
Disappearing Pigeons: The Dream Factory Crew builds a pigeon coop to house a bunch of wandering pigeons that have 'invaded' the Dream Factory.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Boy and Girl discover that while they're at school, the others are home doing all kinds of fun things, leading to a serious case of FOMO.
Rooney accidentally starts a dance craze in Backwoods when she finds a hat that makes her wiggle...
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Sports Centre to make some deliveries and to play some games. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy go to the Farm to make some special deliveries to the farm animals. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Earth Is Round: Nina investigates how people know the Earth is round with the help of Luke, her sight neuron.
Henry visits the Pet Groomers with his pet dog. There he meets a Brush. It's the day of the Big Pet Show but the Pet Groomer had to go home as they were allergic to cats!
Friends MeMo and BaBa travel across Planet BeddyByes meeting new and familiar faces on their journey to bedtime.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'octopus', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different octopuses; an orange octopus, a giant octopus and even a clever octopus!
It's Time for a Dance Class: JoJo is excited to be going to her dance class with Gran Gran. On the way, they meet Bonnie and Henry.
It's Time to Make Shadow Puppets: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film, when suddenly the lights go off!
Cucumber: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.
Orange: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the daring Orange attempting to cross the stage on a tightrope, if she manages to ignore any distractions.
Séamus resumes the role of Sherlock Bones to help Mrs O find out who is playing chalky tricks.
When Oona and Isabelle go to get a glimpse of a Cattle Egret, Baba discovers a whole new small world along the way.
Isabelle and Oona call in to see Mossy, to find him not there and Oona is worried, so they enlist Flynne to help them look.
Doodle Girl helps her new friend Horse-Horse prepare for a unicorn talent show, discovering along the way that being yourself is one of the coolest talents there is!
The Happy Hat Adventure: The MixMups mix up a 'Happy Hat' adventure to find a hat that will cheer up Giggle. But when Giggle keeps the hat to herself, it soon loses it magic.
Vida's Valentine Delay: As Vida and Popcorn are heading home for their Valentine's tradition, new patients pop up!
Sunny's Germy Hands: When Sunny gets a tummy ache from not washing his hands, Vida helps AND teaches him about germs!
Big Foot: After discovering giant footprints in the woods, the Dream Factory Crew goes on an adventurous search for the mythical 'Bigfoot' creature.
Great Adventure Rally: Ms Kashani leads a road rally where the Dream Factory Crew get to demonstrate their navigation skills.
Mandy is looking after James and Sarah's guinea pig, Norris. But when Norris escapes, in the ensuing chaos, Mandy accidentally starts a fire.
The Pioneers work on Annie's farm, but Sarah accidentally lets the sheep go loose. They knock over Annie's stove which starts a fire.
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Fire Station to make some deliveries. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Doctor's Office to make some very special deliveries. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Farmers Market on Wheels: Nia has been hard at work organising the Autumn Farmer's Market at Whistling Woods Station for the human citizens of Sodor.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Smells of Sodor: Thomas is tapped to deliver a sealed, sweet-smelling boxcar. When he loses that boxcar, Thomas and his friends must use their sense of smell to track it down again.
Andy And The Grasshopper Mouse: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the Sonoran desert in America in search of a mystery sound and the animal that made it.
Punky wants to dance. But first Mum tells her to brush her hair, then Cranky tells her to get a blanket and then Con tells her to help with his homework.
Níl an ubh órga ar an liosta siopadóireachta inniu, rud a chuireann díomá ar Hugo agus Sonia.
Níl Sonia ná Hugo in ann dul chomh fada le barr an phictiúir chun scamaill a phéinteáil, an bhfaighidh siad bealach éigin?
Lily invites a friendly seal to the Cockle Cafe and uses the pencil she found on the beach to take his order.
Lily finds a glass jar washed up on the beach, which Salty tells her is just perfect for rockpool dipping. Lily finds Snippy, an adorable hermit crab, and they become good friends.

The speeding up and slowing down of the wind enables Nora to have much fun. Animation about the adventures of two sisters at a seaside camping park.
The sun is drying up the water so Nelly and Nora make a rockpool rescue.
Nanni and Kiva are helping Saul search for his pet snake. They need to find him as he's the mascot for the local St. Patrick's Day parade. But where would a snake hide out?
The Wee Littles decide to build a cup for Mr Robin using forest rubbish!!

Henry meets a bell at the reception desk of a fancy hotel on the busiest day of the year.
